vector.manifest.name: vector.manifest
vector.manifest.title: BME vector manifest
vector.manifest.description: Reports BME Trivium database health from the DOA generic trivium wrapper.

vector.apply.name: vector.apply
vector.apply.title: BME vector apply
vector.apply.description: Applies BME vector upserts and links through the DOA generic trivium wrapper.

recall.candidates.name: recall.candidates
recall.candidates.title: BME recall candidates
recall.candidates.description: Returns candidate node references for BME recall in a single server-side call (search + expand). Read-only; returns only externalId/internalId/namespace/score.

graph.getHead.name: graph.getHead
graph.getHead.title: BME graph getHead
graph.getHead.description: Returns BME graph head (revision + content hash + selected meta) for a chat. Read-only; detects same-revision divergence via a content hash over node/edge record_ids + revision.

graph.loadSnapshot.name: graph.loadSnapshot
graph.loadSnapshot.title: BME graph loadSnapshot
graph.loadSnapshot.description: Returns the full BME graph snapshot (nodes, edges, tombstones, meta, state) for a chat. Read-only; supports minRevision short-circuit to skip payload when unchanged.
